sdk_trace.note: Run killed at the 600s wrapper-timeout before all 10k per-tuple emits flushed. SDK pipeline confirmed working; emit-per-event throughput is the bottleneck (~7.5/sec). Bracket events (session_open/run_start/phase_*) all landed cleanly. Subsequent N=100k and N=1M runs use --no-session to bypass the emit loop and isolate genPolicy/Go/Rust wall-time.

notes: wall_time_total_sec computed from sum of measured phase timings (sample + build_go + go_batch + rust_per_tuple); does not include emit-loop time which is post-measurement and not part of the genPolicy cost-per-tuple metric. Rust phase ~83s reflects ATL-load-time competing-container overhead; baseline standalone is 61.8s.
